texto: Like Jermaine was saying, it's a beautiful day, and we're just glad all of this is behind us. We can go on with our lives. And Michael can go on with his life and do what he does best, and that's making good music, making his fans happy, people happy all over the world.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tito Jackson: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Like Jermaine was saying, it's a beautiful day, and we're just glad all of this is behind us. We …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, happy, beautiful pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de happy e beautiful.

frase_original: Like Jermaine was saying, it's a beautiful day, and we're just glad all of this is behind us. We can go on with our lives. And Michael can go on with his life and do what he does best, and that's making good music, making his fans happy, people happy all over the world.
